title: ‘Insensitive, reckless’, SC describes Haryana Police conduct to a traumatised minor in a sexual assault case
description: The Bench constituted a three-member Special Investigation Team (SIT) of senior women IPS officers — Kala Ramachandran, Anshu Singla and Jasleen Kaur — to take over the probe of the case from the Gurugram Police with immediate effect
